features.name: Chakra Disruption
features.description: Restrain an enemy's chakra: they can't cast jutsu of cost <= this genjutsu's cost until the end of their next turn. Recharges on a short rest; a 2nd use at L7.

features.name: Actualization Die
features.description: A d4 (d6 at L7, d8 at L15). Spend to add psychic damage equal to the result, or raise a cast genjutsu's save DC by half the result. Regain on a long rest.

features.name: Genjutsu Pledge
features.description: Choose a subclass path (features at 2/6/10/14). A Pledge may let genjutsu use CHA instead of WIS.

features.name: Malleable Mirages
features.description: Learn the class genjutsu: 3 at L2, +1 at L4/6/8/10/12/15/18.

features.name: Genjutsu Inception
features.description: A chosen concept (e.g. Illusionary Weapon: a bonus-action psychic weapon using your genjutsu attack bonus).

features.name: Efficient Molding
features.description: Reduce the chakra cost of a known ninjutsu by 1 (min 1) a number of times per long rest equal to your INT modifier.

features.name: Nature Affinity
features.description: Gain an elemental release affinity; advantage on the elemental-advantage clash check for your affinity.

features.name: Ninjutsu Focus
features.description: Choose a subclass path (Elementalist / Summoner / Shape Manipulator).

features.name: Plans
features.description: At the start of combat, hand out tactical Plan dice to allies that can be spent to add to a roll.

features.name: Brave Orders
features.description: Use a bonus action to direct an ally, granting them a reaction attack or movement.

features.name: Operative Specialty
features.description: Choose a subclass path.

features.name: Chakra Scalpel
features.description: A precise chakra blade: a bonus-action melee touch that deals damage or severs muscle (reduces a target's next attack/movement).

features.name: Mystical Palm
features.description: Spend chakra to heal a creature you touch for 1d8 + your WIS mod per chakra die spent.

features.name: Medical Specialty
features.description: Choose a subclass path.

features.name: Scouting Technique
features.description: A maneuver suite tied to your chosen Scouting path.

features.name: Maneuvers
features.description: Learn combat maneuvers fueled by superiority dice.

features.name: Scout Path
features.description: Choose Assault / Defensive / Tactical / Cloning.

features.name: Hunter's Mark
features.description: Mark a quarry; deal extra damage to it and track it unerringly.

features.name: Silent Killing
features.description: Advantage on attacks against a target that can't see you; bonus damage on a surprise strike.

features.name: Hunter Specialty
features.description: Choose a subclass path.

features.name: Weapon Arsenal
features.description: Treat all bukijutsu as known weapon techniques; draw/stow weapons freely.

features.name: Precision Strike
features.description: Add a bonus to a weapon attack's damage equal to half your proficiency, scaling with rank.

features.name: Weapon Style
features.description: Choose a subclass path.

features.name: Combo Points
features.description: Land unarmed/taijutsu strikes to bank Combo Points; spend them to power finishers.

features.name: Unarmored Defense
features.description: While unarmored, AC = 10 + DEX mod + CON mod.

features.name: Inner Gates
features.description: Open chakra gates to surge power at the cost of exhaustion.

features.name: Taijutsu Style
features.description: Choose a subclass path.
